km.Croft, Yorkshire, England: cរ៉ុពត, យ៉ុរកស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Clervaux於大約1252年出生在英國越可爾卡芙特時，他的父親Robert Clervaux26歲，母親Eva Fairfax23歲。他和Maude Cerf至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Clervaux于大约1252年出生在英国越可爾卡芙特时，他的父亲Robert Clervaux26岁，母亲Eva Fairfax23岁。他和Maude Cerf至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Clervaux was born about 1252, in Croft, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Clervaux, was 26 and his mother, Eva Fairfax, was 23. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Maude Cerf.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Clervaux est né environ 1252, à Croft, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Clervaux, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eva Fairfax, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Maude Cerf.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Clervaux um 1252 in Croft, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Clervaux 26 und seine Mutter Eva Fairfax 23. Er hatte mit Maude Cerf mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Clervaux è nato il circa 1252 nel Croft, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Clervaux, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Eva Fairfax, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Maude Cerf.

ja.Croft, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアクロフト
ja.lifeSummary: John Clervauxが約1252年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロフトで生まれた時，父Robert Clervauxは26歳，母Eva Fairfaxは23歳であった。彼はMaude Cerfとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: John Clervaux(이)가 대략 1252년 영국 요르크실르 크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Clervaux(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Fairfax(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Maude Cerf(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Clervaux nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Clervaux, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eva Fairfax, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Maude Cerf.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Clervaux родился около 1252 г. в местности крофт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Clervaux было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Fairfax, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Maude Cerf.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Clervaux nació aproximadamente 1252, en Croft, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Clervaux, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eva Fairfax, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Maude Cerf.
